species: We analyzed if features associated with hypoxia are recognizable in MSI experiments from tissue of five HNSCC xenograft samples.
tissue: A total of five samples of untreated tumors from the xenograft model CAL33 were utilized.
cell_type: a consecutive slice was stained with pimonidazole as a biochemical marker of hypoxic cells.
disease_state: we showed that our proposed workflow extracts relevant peptides for tumor hypoxia.
sample_source: we utilized convolutional autoencoders to aggregate features associated with tumor hypoxia, a parameter with significant spatial heterogeneity, in cancer xenograft models.
cell_line: A total of five samples of untreated tumors from the xenograft model CAL33 were utilized.
